data.desc:
[EndSkill] Heal 5% HP for 2 allies that have the lowest current HP percentages and apply 2 [ScarletMothRodion] to the said allies (minimum HP healed: 1)
- Heal additional allies equal to (Lust Reson. - 1) (max 2 allies)
data.name: Into the Sunset

data.desc:
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Laceration]) on all targets (max 2)
[EndSkill] Heal 8% HP for 2 allies that have the lowest current HP percentages and apply 2 [ScarletMothRodion] to the said allies (minimum HP healed: 1)
- Heal additional allies equal to (Lust Reson. - 1) (max 2 allies)
- If the healed ally has equipped a Lust Skill, heal 3 SP on the said ally as well
data.name: Into the Sunset

main: Use with Lust Reson. and allies with Lust skills for additional HP and SP healing.
Buffs {keyword:Wrath} and {keyword:Lust} damage by applying Fragility on enemies.
Passively makes {sinner:9}'s {keyword:Wrath} and {keyword:Lust} attacks deal bonus damage.

passiveList.desc:
If this unit's leftmost Base Attack Skill on the Dashboard is a Wrath or a Lust Skill, at Attack End, deal 30% of the damage dealt against the main target with that Skill as its corresponding Affinity damage to a random enemy (max 30 damage; for Focused Encounters, a Part)

If this unit dealt the maximum possible damage with the above effect, gain 1 Affinity DMG Up for the corresponding Affinity next turn, and disable the above effect from triggering for 2 turns
passiveList.name: What Distinguishes Moths from Butterflies
